summary: Visual Refinement Pass - Frontend Regression Testing Complete. All 11 customer flows tested and working correctly. Palette change from dark (#0B0B0D, #D4B36A, #EDE9E1) to warm ivory (#F6F4F0), deep charcoal (#1A1A1A), muted champagne (#C4A76C) verified across all pages.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: Customer login flow works (email/password via 'Sign in with password instead' link)
VERIFIED: Customer Home page renders with active case card showing event type, city (Mumbai), guest count (50), RM name (Test RM Onboarding), progress bar
VERIFIED: Explore Venues CTA renders with dark background (#1A1A1A)
VERIFIED: Case Detail Overview tab shows event info card, RM card, 3 assistance buttons (Callback/Visit/Question), Message RM button
VERIFIED: Case Detail Messages tab shows RM card with 'Online' badge (green dot), compose bar at bottom
VERIFIED: Message sending works - message appears in chat
VERIFIED: All section tabs (Overview/Messages/Shared/Payments/Timeline) navigate correctly
VERIFIED: Landing page hero renders with search card (City/Near Me toggle, city selector, Find My Perfect Venue button)
VERIFIED: Landing page venue carousel renders below hero
VERIFIED: Bottom tab bar navigation works across Home/Explore/My Case/Messages/Profile
VERIFIED: Profile page renders with Facebook-style cover photo (banquet hall image), avatar with user initial overlapping cover, gold camera button, user name/email, Basic Info form section
VERIFIED: New palette applied correctly - warm ivory (#F6F4F0) base, deep charcoal (#1A1A1A) text, muted champagne (#C4A76C) accent
VERIFIED: Bottom tab bar uses #F6F4F0 background with subtle border
seed_data_creation: None - used existing demo customer data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Visual refinement pass verified. All customer flows working correctly after CSS/className changes. Palette changed from dark (#0B0B0D, #D4B36A, #EDE9E1) to warm ivory (#F6F4F0), deep charcoal (#1A1A1A), muted champagne (#C4A76C). Auth page: click 'Sign in with password instead' to reveal email/password fields. Customer has active cases in the system.
